title: Clinical implications of discordance in HER2 reassessment from HercepTest to 4B5 in metastatic breast cancer.
abstract: HER2-low breast cancer has emerged as a therapeutic category following the DESTINY-Breast04 trial, where trastuzumab deruxtecan (T-DXd) improved survival. As the Ventana 4B5 assay was the companion diagnostic in this trial, many patients previously tested with the Dako HercepTest required reassessment. However, the frequency and clinical predictors of discrepancies between these assays remain unclear. This study aimed to evaluate discordance frequency between HercepTest ® and 4B5 and identify associated clinicopathological factors.
